about.title: About us
about.heading: African craftsmanship
about.description: AFI Collection is a showcase of Beninese artisan excellence — macrame, fabric dyeing, decoration, agrifood. Each piece tells the story of a passionate artisan who perpetuates techniques passed down from generation to generation.

services.title: Our services
services.heading: Exceptional
services.macrame_desc: Handmade artisan creations with finesse and originality.
services.teinture_desc: Transforming fabrics into traditional works of art.
services.decoration_desc: A unique and authentic touch for your spaces.
services.agro_desc: Promoting local natural products from Benin.

why_choose.quality_desc: Noble materials and know-how passed down through generations.
why_choose.trust_desc: Authentic products, secure payment, guaranteed service.
